title: cypellium nervosum
intro: Cypellium nervosum, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cypellium nervosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
